crash.body: We don report the error. Your progress dey safe for our servers — nothing lost.

footer.tagline: Na Learning Operating System wey dey based on how people dey behave — to make deep learning wey go last the normal thing, no be exception.

tagline: Learning wey dey stick — we build am so that people fit really learn.
